# The Software Company of Hong Kong

> Independent R&D lab building systems software, runtimes, developer tools, application platforms, operating systems, browsers, and programming languages.

Static Crepus site. Agents should fetch the Markdown/text files below instead of scraping the rendered app shell.

## Markdown

- [Full bundle](https://tsc.hk/llms-full.txt): One request with the agent guide and readable site text.
- [Agent guide](https://tsc.hk/agent.md): Fetch order and hosting notes.

---

# The Software Company of Hong Kong — agent guide

> Use direct static files. Do not scrape the HTML shell unless no Markdown file answers the task.

## Best first request

`curl -sL https://tsc.hk/llms-full.txt`

## Files

- https://tsc.hk/llms.txt — compact index
- https://tsc.hk/llms-full.txt — full bundle


---

# Rendered site text

the software company of hong kong

an independent R&D lab building systems software, runtimes, developer tools, application platforms, and experimental computing platforms.

PROJECTS

[crepuscularity — write react + rust for hardware accelerated mobile and desktop apps, websites and webextensions, terminal ui and embedded appliances](https://crepuscularity.tsc.hk)

[aurorality — compile crepuscularity to swiftui](https://github.com/tschk/aurorality)

[crepuscularity + aurora lite — drop crepuscularity into any electron app or website to get the same ui but native with the same javascript/typescript backend](https://crepuscularity.tsc.hk/docs/lite.html)

[alpenglow — Linux operating system that boots in under a second and is smaller than an average picture](https://github.com/tschk/alpenglow)

[soliloquy — the immutable web-native ultraminimal os built on top of alpenglow. spiritual successor to chromeos](https://github.com/tschk/soliloquy)

[inauguration — capability-aware compiler pipeline for deterministic execution and agent-native software](https://github.com/tschk/inauguration)

[space — component-based compiler-centric ground-up non-posix operating system](https://github.com/tschk/space)

[equilibrium — cross c compiling language interoperability with one call automagically](https://github.com/tschk/equilibrium)

[eqswift — two lines to ffi rust to swift automagically](https://github.com/tschk/eqswift)

[rv8 — browser engine combining Servo rendering with V8 JavaScript](https://github.com/tschk/rv8)

CONTACT

[GitHub — https://github.com/tschk](https://github.com/tschk)

[X — @tsc_hk](https://x.com/tsc_hk)

[Instagram — @thesoftwarecompanyofhongkong](https://instagram.com/thesoftwarecompanyofhongkong)

[Email — hello@tsc.hk](mailto:hello@tsc.hk)

site built with crepuscularity
